text: Investigation 2026-07-02: TWO independent problems. (1) WAIT-FOR-SYNC: registry packages.json (bbuchsbaum.r-universe.dev repo, commit 03ff3ed1 2026-07-02T00:55Z) correctly lists amatrix + 4 backends with right subdirs, but r-universe/bbuchsbaum build monorepo last synced 2026-06-30T22:35 — amatrix not yet a submodule, no build ever attempted (404 on /api/packages/amatrix, absent from /api/ls and src/contrib/PACKAGES). No misconfiguration, no build failure — recheck in a few hours; if still absent, nudge sync with empty registry commit. (2) DOCS BUG, independent: install snippet uses getOption("repos") which is c(CRAN="@CRAN@") in fresh non-interactive R -> 'trying to use CRAN without setting a mirror'. Reproduced. Fix at README.md:128,139 and vignettes/gpu.Rmd:59,62 to pin https://cloud.r-project.org (R/backend-enable.R:21 hint string too; DESCRIPTION Additional_repositories is fine).
